name: Wikidata
data_types: entities; labels; statements; references; external IDs
rate_limit: 10/min unidentified; 200/min identified; 2000/min mature authenticated; WDQS not stated
risks: community editable; Tier 1/2 confirmation required for death and direct influence

name: Wikimedia Commons
access_method: MediaWiki API; file pages; dumps; downloads
access_limits: identify client; max 3 concurrent; media CDN limit not stated
rate_limit: Wikimedia Action/REST limits; CDN not stated
risks: uploader claims can be wrong; file-level review; personality/trademark/cultural risks

name: Getty Vocabularies / ULAN
data_types: identity control; names; roles; life dates; relationships; sources
access_limits: numeric limit not stated; legacy XML retired
risks: coverage incomplete; identity data does not prove artwork attribution or influence

name: The Metropolitan Museum of Art Open Access
data_types: collection objects; artists; dates; materials; OA flag; images
risks: primaryImage is not rights proof; non-OA images restricted

name: Europeana
data_types: aggregated EDM metadata; object links; thumbnails; IIIF; entities
access_limits: free key except SPARQL; bulk rate requires confirmation
rate_limit: numeric limit not stated; official pages conflict
risks: cross-provider quality and rights; deletion requests; key/rate documentation conflict

name: Smithsonian Open Access
access_limits: official GitHub bulk archived 2026-05-21; inspect headers
risks: non-CC0 and culturally sensitive assets; privacy/trademark; stale bulk docs

name: Rijksmuseum Data Services
data_types: objects; images; people; places; exhibitions; library
risks: PID redirect changed 2026-06-29; evolving structure and rights

name: National Gallery of Art, Washington
risks: CSV image URL is not OA proof; other website content has narrower terms

name: Art Institute of Chicago
data_license: field_specific: description CC BY 4.0; other artwork data CC0
risks: field/endpoint-level licensing; IIIF can expose non-public-domain images

name: Cleveland Museum of Art Open Access
access_limits: future throttling/key possible; update frequency differs
risks: third-party rights remain; update cadence wording differs

name: Catalogue of Life
access_limits: public GET/full releases no key; some ChecklistBank downloads need account

name: GBIF
data_types: taxonomy; specimens; occurrences; events; datasets; media links
risks: record quality; sensitive coordinates; one occurrence is not stable distribution

name: Encyclopedia of Life
data_types: taxonomy; traits; interactions; text; references; media
risks: mixed object licenses; aggregation; retain provider and no page-level inheritance

name: Global Biotic Interactions
access_limits: large multi-name queries slow; use DOI snapshot
risks: normalized names differ; aggregate record insufficient for animation

name: IUCN Red List
access_method: API v4; account downloads; spatial datasets
access_limits: dynamic throttling; caching/redistribution may require permission
risks: written permission generally required; images usually third-party; assessment version/date mandatory

name: RESOLVE Ecoregions 2017
risks: 2017 analytical framework; boundaries are models not current state

name: Natural History Museum London Data Portal
risks: some datasets lack license; core data/media licenses remain separate
